## ADR-0002 (Context / Decision / Consequences)
**Context.** `src/lib` holds pure dependency-free helpers (`cn.ts`, `format.ts`). The three utilities are deliberately **file-disjoint**; the only shared surface is `package.json` test wiring (one-time, owned by ADR-0001).

**Decision.** Each module is its own file + its own `*.test.ts`; **no module imports another**. `slugify` is intentionally ASCII-only. Tests use extensionless imports to satisfy strict `tsc`.

**Consequences.** +25 tests for these modules, no new framework surface. Parallel implement/merge proven conflict-free outside the single `package.json` edit. ASCII-only `slugify` degrades non-Latin input to separators — diacritic folding (`café→cafe`) is a separate future task if SEO needs it.

## Task breakdown — 3 parallel tasks · 6 story points (all done)
| # | Task | File set (disjoint) | Pts | Status |
|---|------|--------------------|-----|--------|
| 1 | `slugify(text)` | `src/lib/slug.ts` + `slug.test.ts` | 2 | ✅ done |
| 2 | `clamp` + `roundTo` | `src/lib/num.ts` + `num.test.ts` | 2 | ✅ done |
| 3 | `truncate` + `titleCase` | `src/lib/str.ts` + `str.test.ts` | 2 | ✅ done |
| — | Harness wiring (one-time, shared) | `package.json` (`test` + `tsx`) | — | ✅ done |

```chart
Tests passing (total suite): 42
New module tests (slug+num+str): 25
Tests failing: 0
Suite runtime ms: 289
```

## Edge cases covered (not happy-path)
- **`slugify`** — collapse `[^a-z0-9]+` to single `-`, strip edge `-`; empty/all-separator → `""`; idempotent; ASCII-only (`Café déjà vu` → `caf-d-j-vu`, asserted by design).
- **`clamp`** — inclusive bounds; `±Infinity` snaps to bound; `NaN` value → `NaN`; `min>max` / non-finite bound throws `RangeError`.
- **`roundTo`** — exponential re-parse beats binary FP (`1.005→1.01`, `2.345→2.35`); non-finite value unchanged; negative/`NaN` decimals → 0.
- **`truncate`** — ellipsis budgeted against `max` (`truncate("Hello world",8)==="Hello w…"`, len 8); within-budget unchanged; `max≤ellipsis.length` → prefix of ellipsis; custom ellipsis honored.
- **`titleCase`** — first char up / rest down; **whitespace runs preserved** (`"hello   world"`→`"Hello   World"`).

## Verification
- `npm test` → **42 pass / 0 fail** (~289 ms, Node v24.12.0) — 25 from the three new modules; the remainder are ADR-0001's surviving `format`/`rank` tests.
- `tsc --noEmit` → clean.
- ADR written: `docs/adr/ADR-0002-parallel-pure-utility-modules.md`.
